user.title: Datapoints
user.description: Record custom datapoints and annotate your history and statistics charts, and additionally perform analysis of your data. Click Submit to set up the integration.

record.name: Record Event
record.description: Record a custom event with an optional annotation for deeper analysis.

annotation.name: Annotation
annotation.description: Detailed and longer form information about the event.

entity_ids.name: Entities
entity_ids.description: Entities, or targets to associate this event with. Optional.
